kw.name: Open Browser To Test Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance. Use this keyword for quick experiments or debugging sessions.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Open Browser is for quick experimentation and debugging only. Use New Page for production.

{"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\david\\.qclaw\\workspace-agent-a9614b46\\rf-playwright-test-framework\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\bb1a0a64-bbad-496a-a5b3-6d027c666878"}
Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:8080/test_page.html
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance. Use this keyword for quick experiments or debugging sessions.

kw.name: Set Browser Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

kw.name: Handle Future Dialogs
kw.doc: Handle next dialog on page with ``action``.
Launch browser and navigate to test page

kw.name: Login And Go To Main Page
Run Keyword And Return Status
Get Page Ids
kw.doc: Returns a list of page ids based on the context and browser selection. See `Browser, Context and Page` for more information about Page and related concepts.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Get Page Ids
kw.doc: Returns a list of page ids based on the context and browser selection. See `Browser, Context and Page` for more information about Page and related concepts.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Switch Page
kw.msg: Switching to page page=4977aef3-7094-475e-8178-7a6c902a2938,context CURRENT, browser CURRENT
kw.doc: Switches the active browser page to another open page by ``id`` or ``NEW``.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Exit For Loop
kw.doc: Stops executing the enclosing FOR loop.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector #login-page at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'test' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'test' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector #main-page at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Navigate to test page, login, ensure main page is shown

kw.name: Get Element
kw.doc: Returns a reference to a Playwright [https://playwright.dev/docs/api/class-locator|Locator].

kw.name: Cleanup And Go To Main Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector #login-page at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'test' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'test' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector #main-page at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Close all extra pages and reload main page

Navigate to test page, login, ensure main page is shown

kw.name: Hover
kw.doc: Moves the virtual mouse and scrolls to the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Cleanup And Go To Main Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

Switch Page

kw.doc: Switches the active browser page to another open page by ``id`` or ``NEW``.

kw.name: Continue For Loop If
kw.doc: Skips the current FOR loop iteration if the ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Continue For Loop If
kw.doc: Skips the current FOR loop iteration if the ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Element
kw.doc: Returns a reference to a Playwright [https://playwright.dev/docs/api/class-locator|Locator].

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Switch Page
kw.msg: Switching to page page=4977aef3-7094-475e-8178-7a6c902a2938,context CURRENT, browser CURRENT
kw.doc: Switches the active browser page to another open page by ``id`` or ``NEW``.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Exit For Loop
kw.doc: Stops executing the enclosing FOR loop.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector #login-page at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'test' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'test' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector #main-page at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Navigate to test page, login, ensure main page is shown

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Count Pages
Get Page Ids
kw.doc: Returns a list of page ids based on the context and browser selection. See `Browser, Context and Page` for more information about Page and related concepts.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.
Return number of open pages in current context

kw.name: Get Page Ids
kw.doc: Returns a list of page ids based on the context and browser selection. See `Browser, Context and Page` for more information about Page and related concepts.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Switch Page
kw.msg: Switching to page page=9fcfd00e-1aec-4917-81ae-ccfdf186fa58,context CURRENT, browser CURRENT
kw.doc: Switches the active browser page to another open page by ``id`` or ``NEW``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Count Pages
Get Page Ids
kw.doc: Returns a list of page ids based on the context and browser selection. See `Browser, Context and Page` for more information about Page and related concepts.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.
Return number of open pages in current context

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Cleanup And Go To Main Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector #login-page at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'test' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'test' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector #main-page at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Close all extra pages and reload main page

test.msg: Successfully closed Page with runBeforeUnload false
Successfully closed Page with runBeforeUnload false
Successfully closed Page with runBeforeUnload false
Successfully closed Page with runBeforeUnload false

kw.doc: Returns a list of page ids based on the context and browser selection. See `Browser, Context and Page` for more information about Page and related concepts.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Switch Page
kw.msg: Switching to page page=f1e60d27-f312-4f89-b909-e8d955adf7d0,context CURRENT, browser CURRENT
kw.doc: Switches the active browser page to another open page by ``id`` or ``NEW``.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Continue For Loop If
kw.doc: Skips the current FOR loop iteration if the ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Continue For Loop If
kw.doc: Skips the current FOR loop iteration if the ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

errors.msg: Open Browser is for quick experimentation and debugging only. Use New Page for production.
